# Copilot Instructions

## Project Overview

This is a demo project used for testing development workflows and GitHub features.

## Coding Standards

* Write clean and readable code
* Use meaningful variable and function names
* Keep functions small and focused
* Avoid duplicate logic
* Add comments only when necessary

## Security Requirements

* Never hardcode secrets, tokens, or passwords
* Validate all user inputs
* Follow least-privilege access principles
* Use secure defaults for configuration

## Testing Requirements

* Add or update tests for new functionality
* Ensure existing tests continue to pass
* Prefer automated tests where possible

## Pull Request Guidelines

* Keep PRs small and focused
* Include a clear summary of changes
* Document breaking changes
* Complete the PR checklist before requesting review

## Documentation

* Update README when functionality changes
* Add examples for new features when applicable

## Preferred Responses from Copilot

* Suggest maintainable code
* Explain complex logic briefly
* Prefer readability over cleverness
* Flag potential security or performance concerns

## Do Not

* Introduce unnecessary dependencies
* Commit generated files unless required
* Remove tests without explanation
